title: Miracle-Gro All Purpose Continuous Release Plant Food Tablets - Pack 35
features: Feeds for up to 6 months – One application lasts all season.
Smart release technology – Nutrients delivered when plants need them most.
Versatile use – Ideal for flowers, vegetables, shrubs, and houseplants.
Balanced nutrition – NPK 17-9-11 with added magnesium and micronutrients.
Easy application – Just push tablets into soil; no measuring or mixing.
description: Product Description Give your plants the care they deserve with Miracle-Gro Premium All Purpose Continuous Release Plant Food Tablets. Designed for convenience and performance, these easy-to-use tablets provide a steady supply of essential nutrients for up to 6 months, so your plants stay healthy and vibrant all season long. The smart coating technology ensures nutrients are released only when conditions are right, preventing waste and promoting strong, balanced growth. Perfect for flowers, fruits, vegetables, shrubs, and houseplants, these tablets work in pots, containers, hanging baskets, and garden beds. With a balanced NPK 17-9-11 formula plus magnesium and micronutrients, your plants get everything they need for lush foliage, vibrant blooms, and abundant harvests. Simply push the tablets into the soil near the plant base—no mixing, no mess, no hassle. Ingredients NPK 17-9-11 with magnesium and micronutrients. Directions All purpose so can be used on all plants including fruit and veg in pots, hanging baskets, tubs, containers or mix it into your compost. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Wear protective clothing during application. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. See more
